mapper.select: SELECT sh.*, p.name AS product_name, wl.code AS location_code, u.real_name AS operator_name, so.order_no, c.name AS customer_name FROM shipment sh LEFT JOIN product p ON sh.product_id = p.id LEFT JOIN warehouse_location wl ON sh.location_id = wl.id LEFT JOIN user u ON sh.operator_id = u.id LEFT JOIN sales_order so ON sh.sales_order_id = so.id LEFT JOIN customer c ON so.customer_id = c.id ORDER BY sh.shipment_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO shipment (shipment_no, sales_order_id, product_id, quantity, location_id, operator_id, remark) VALUES (#{shipmentNo}, #{salesOrderId}, #{productId}, #{quantity}, #{locationId}, #{operatorId}, #{remark})
